svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="SequenceCheckout" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-779" dy="-180" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1560" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Sequence — Checkout & Payment (single transaction, idempotent)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="900" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll1" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Customer
(web/mobile)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="150" x="80" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll2" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="CheckoutController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="150" x="320" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll3" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="CheckoutService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="150" x="580" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll4" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Payment
Gateway (mock)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="150" x="840" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll5" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="DB
(Order/Cart repos)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="150" x="1080" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ll6" parent="1" style="shape=umlLifeline;perimeter=lifelinePerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="DeliveryService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="150" x="1320" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="POST /api/v1/checkout {Idempotency-Key}"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="155" y="150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="395" y="150" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="checkout(key, cmd)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="395" y="195" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="655" y="195" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mNote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;align=left;" value="if key already seen → return existing order (idempotent)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="360" x="580" y="205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="load active cart + save Order (PAYMENT_PENDING)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="255" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1155" y="255" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="charge(amount)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="915" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=open;dashed=1;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="CONFIRMED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="915" y="340" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="655" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="Order → PAYMENT_CONFIRMED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="385" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1155" y="385" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m7" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="createDelivery + generate 6-digit OTP (hash)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="430" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1395" y="430" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m8" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=open;dashed=1;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="Delivery (DISPATCH_PENDING)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1395" y="470" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="655" y="470" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m9" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=open;dashed=1;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="OrderView (commit tx)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="515" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="395" y="515" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m10" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;endArrow=open;dashed=1;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" value="200 OK OrderView"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="395" y="560" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="155" y="560" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
